scenarios.name: overdue_to_restart_required
scenarios.inject: 构造超时且无实质进展的执行中任务，连续触发两次 heartbeat

observed.afterSecondBlocker: Two consecutive no-progress heartbeats based on missing substantive evidence. Task restart required.

scenarios.name: runner_recovers_restart_required
scenarios.inject: 直接把任务置为 restart_required，验证 runner 是否重启为执行中并切换方案

observed.currentApproach: 任务重启后新方案：先恢复任务推进机制，再要求进入新的具体执行步骤
observed.blocker: 旧方案已失效，已由 task_runner 自动重启为新方案。
observed.nextAction: 向用户/主会话明确宣布旧方案失效，并以一个具体可执行步骤重新开始任务。

scenarios.name: executor_advance_after_restart
scenarios.inject: 先让 runner 重启任务，再让 executor 推进一步骤

observed.nextAction: 确认当前任务的真实目标与可验证产物

scenarios.name: completion_evidence_closes_task
scenarios.inject: 注入可验证完成证据，验证 heartbeat 是否直接收口为已完成

observed.nextAction: No further action required. Task has verifiable completion evidence.

scenarios.name: runner_circuit_breaker
scenarios.inject: 构造重复重启且无进展的任务，验证 runner 是否打开断路器转 blocked

observed.blocker: Automatic restart circuit breaker engaged: repeated restarts occurred without substantive progress evidence.
observed.nextAction: Stop auto-restarting this task. Require a new execution approach that produces a verifiable output before resuming.
